description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and in-seam, half sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Relive those starry crazy days of yore in style in this black t-shirt from lee. Team this cotton tee with jeans or shorts and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
